name: pr-demo
author: mikeyobrien
description: Use when creating animated demos (GIFs) for pull requests or documentation. Covers terminal recording with asciinema and conversion to GIF/SVG for GitHub embedding.

name: doc-author
author: mintlify
description: Write, edit, and maintain documentation. Use for collaborative drafting, autonomous writing, or improving existing docs. Defaults to collaborative mode where the human makes final decisions. Built by Mintlify.
_original_description: Write and maintain documentation autonomously. Use when assigned to create, update, or improve documentation without direct human oversight. Always opens PRs for review. Built by Mintlify.

name: doc-reader
author: mintlify
description: Read and navigate external documentation efficiently. Invoke when the task requires checking how a specific function, endpoint, or configuration option works; when the user references an API, SDK, library, or third-party tool by name; when any docs URL or documentation site is mentioned; or when implementing something that depends on an external service or package.
_original_description: Efficiently consume and navigate external documentation sites. Use when researching APIs, libraries, or tools; when the user mentions docs, documentation, or references a docs URL; or when you need to understand how something works before implementing it.

name: update-nav
author: mintlify
description: Add new pages to docs.json navigation structure. Updates navigation groups based on user journey (Customize, Deploy, etc.). Use when the user asks to add a page to navigation, update docs.json, add to nav, or include a new page in the sidebar.

name: add-review-comment
author: mlflow
description: Add a review comment to a GitHub pull request.
description_zh: 该技能通过GitHub CLI自动化向GitHub拉取请求添加代码审查评论。支持单行和多行评论，包含创建建议代码块的实践，并输出评论链接。本质上是gh api命令的封装。

name: analyze-ci
author: mlflow
description: Analyze failed GitHub Action jobs for a pull request.
description_zh: 该技能分析MLflow项目Pull Request中失败的GitHub Action任务，自动提取失败原因和相关日志片段，帮助开发者快速定位CI/CD流水线中的问题。
_original_description: This skill analyzes failed GitHub Action jobs for MLflow pull requests, extracting root causes and relevant log snippets. It automates the tedious process of manually digging through CI logs to identify why tests or builds failed.

name: copilot
author: mlflow
description: Hand off a task to GitHub Copilot.
description_zh: 该技能通过Claude直接调用GitHub Copilot创建任务。它封装了'gh agent-task create'命令，让用户无需离开聊天界面即可将编码任务委托给Copilot。实现简洁，专注于单一工作流。
_original_description: This skill provides a direct interface to create GitHub Copilot tasks through Claude. It wraps the 'gh agent-task create' command, allowing users to delegate coding tasks to Copilot without leaving the chat interface. The implementation is minimal and focused on a single workflow.

name: fetch-diff
author: mlflow
description: Fetch PR diff with filtering and line numbers for code review.
description_zh: 一个命令行工具，用于获取GitHub PR代码差异，过滤自动生成的文件，并添加行号以便于代码审查时定位评论位置。自动检测GitHub令牌并提供格式化输出。
_original_description: A command-line tool that fetches GitHub PR diffs, filters out auto-generated files, and adds line numbers for easier code review comment placement. It auto-detects GitHub tokens and provides formatted output.

name: fetch-unresolved-comments
author: mlflow
description: Fetch unresolved PR review comments using GitHub GraphQL API, filtering out resolved and outdated feedback.
description_zh: 使用GitHub GraphQL API获取未解决的PR审阅评论，过滤已解决的线程。自动从环境变量或git CLI检测PR URL，处理令牌认证。输出按文件分组的结构化JSON评论数据。

name: create-mcp-app
author: modelcontextprotocol
description: This skill should be used when the user asks to "create an MCP App", "add a UI to an MCP tool", "build an interactive MCP View", "scaffold an MCP App", or needs guidance on MCP Apps SDK patterns, UI-resource registration, MCP App lifecycle, or host integration. Provides comprehensive guidance for building MCP Apps with interactive UIs.

name: migrate-oai-app
author: modelcontextprotocol
description: This skill should be used when the user asks to "migrate from OpenAI Apps SDK", "convert OpenAI App to MCP", "port from window.openai", "migrate from skybridge", "convert openai/outputTemplate", or needs guidance on converting OpenAI Apps SDK applications to MCP Apps SDK. Provides step-by-step migration guidance with API mapping tables.

name: gemini
author: molt-bot
description: Gemini CLI for one-shot Q&A, summaries, and generation.

name: prose
author: molt-bot
description: OpenProse VM skill pack. Activate on any `prose` command, .prose files, or OpenProse mentions; orchestrates multi-agent workflows.

name: voice-call
author: molt-bot
description: Start voice calls via the OpenClaw voice-call plugin.
_original_description: Start voice calls via the Clawdbot voice-call plugin.

name: idapython
author: mrexodia
description: IDA Pro Python scripting for reverse engineering. Use when writing IDAPython scripts, analyzing binaries, working with IDA's API for disassembly, decompilation (Hex-Rays), type systems, cross-references, functions, segments, or any IDA database manipulation. Covers ida_* modules (50+), idautils iterators, and common patterns.
description_zh: 该技能为在IDA Pro中编写IDAPython脚本提供结构化指南，专注于现代API模块。它将常见的逆向工程任务映射到特定模块，提供具体的代码模式，并警告避免使用旧版实践。文档以任务为导向，包含了函数、交叉引用、字节操作和反编译的清晰示例。

name: create-config
author: msalganik
description: Creates timestamped configuration files for sports poetry multi-agent workflows. Invoked when users request to 'create config', 'set up configuration', 'configure sports poetry', provide sports lists for generation, or need help understanding configuration options. Validates sports count (3-5), checks API keys for LLM mode, and generates both JSON config and reproducible generator script (project)
description_zh: 为体育诗歌多智能体工作流创建带时间戳的配置文件。

name: development-tools
author: multigres
description: Run unit tests, integration tests, and development tasks for multigres

name: advanced-evaluation
author: muratcankoylan
description: This skill should be used when the user asks to "implement LLM-as-judge", "compare model outputs", "create evaluation rubrics", "mitigate evaluation bias", or mentions direct scoring, pairwise comparison, position bias, evaluation pipelines, or automated quality assessment.
description_zh: 该技能提供构建LLM作为评判员的评估系统的具体模式，涵盖直接评分、带位置偏差缓解的成对比较以及评分标准生成。文档包含具体示例、偏差分析和集成指南。

name: bdi-mental-states
author: muratcankoylan
description: This skill should be used when the user asks to "model agent mental states", "implement BDI architecture", "create belief-desire-intention models", "transform RDF to beliefs", "build cognitive agent", or mentions BDI ontology, mental state modeling, rational agency, or neuro-symbolic AI integration.
description_zh: 一个用于实现BDI认知架构的复杂技能，具备强大的本体论基础和神经符号集成模式，可将RDF转换为心智状态。
_original_description: A sophisticated skill for implementing BDI cognitive architectures, enabling RDF-to-mental-state transformations with strong ontological foundations and neuro-symbolic integration patterns.

name: book-sft-pipeline
author: muratcankoylan
description: This skill should be used when the user asks to "fine-tune on books", "create SFT dataset", "train style model", "extract ePub text", or mentions style transfer, LoRA training, book segmentation, or author voice replication.
description_zh: 一个完整的从书籍创建SFT数据集并训练风格迁移模型的管道，提供详细的架构指导和实用的实现示例。
_original_description: A comprehensive pipeline for creating SFT datasets from books and training style-transfer models with detailed architectural guidance and practical implementation examples.

name: context-compression
author: muratcankoylan
description: This skill should be used when the user asks to "compress context", "summarize conversation history", "implement compaction", "reduce token usage", or mentions context compression, structured summarization, tokens-per-task optimization, or long-running agent sessions exceeding context limits.

name: context-degradation
author: muratcankoylan
description: This skill should be used when the user asks to "diagnose context problems", "fix lost-in-middle issues", "debug agent failures", "understand context poisoning", or mentions context degradation, attention patterns, context clash, context confusion, or agent performance degradation. Provides patterns for recognizing and mitigating context failures.
description_zh: 该技能提供诊断和修复LLM智能体上下文性能下降的模式，专注于解决“中间丢失”效应和上下文污染等问题。它提供了四桶策略和架构模式等具体方法，以缓解长对话中的性能衰减。
_original_description: This skill provides patterns for diagnosing and fixing context degradation in LLM agents, focusing on issues like lost-in-middle effects and context poisoning. It offers concrete strategies like the four-bucket approach and architectural patterns to mitigate performance drops in long conversations.

name: context-fundamentals
author: muratcankoylan
description: This skill should be used when the user asks to "understand context", "explain context windows", "design agent architecture", "debug context issues", "optimize context usage", or discusses context components, attention mechanics, progressive disclosure, or context budgeting. Provides foundational understanding of context engineering for AI agent systems.
description_zh: 提供AI智能体系统设计和调试的基础知识，解释上下文组件、注意力机制和渐进式加载。帮助开发者优化token使用，有效管理系统提示、工具定义和消息历史记录。
_original_description: Provides foundational knowledge for designing and debugging AI agent systems by explaining context components, attention mechanics, and progressive disclosure. Helps developers optimize token usage and manage system prompts, tool definitions, and message history effectively.

name: context-optimization
author: muratcankoylan
description: This skill should be used when the user asks to "optimize context", "reduce token costs", "improve context efficiency", "implement KV-cache optimization", "partition context", or mentions context limits, observation masking, context budgeting, or extending effective context capacity.
description_zh: 一个全面且高度实用的LLM上下文优化技能，提供了清晰的令牌缩减、成本节约和性能提升策略，并附有优秀的实施指导。

name: digital-brain
author: muratcankoylan
description: This skill should be used when the user asks to "write a post", "check my voice", "look up contact", "prepare for meeting", "weekly review", "track goals", or mentions personal brand, content creation, network management, or voice consistency.
description_zh: 一个用于管理数字形象、内容和人际关系的结构化个人操作系统技能。它采用渐进式加载，只调用所需模块，为撰写帖子、准备会议和每周复盘提供了清晰的工作流。系统基于仅追加的JSONL日志和便于AI解析的特定文件格式。

name: evaluation
author: muratcankoylan
description: This skill should be used when the user asks to "evaluate agent performance", "build test framework", "measure agent quality", "create evaluation rubrics", or mentions LLM-as-judge, multi-dimensional evaluation, agent testing, or quality gates for agent pipelines.
description_zh: 一份全面且结构清晰的AI智能体性能评估指南，提供了实用的方法论、多维度评估标准和基于证据的见解，适用于系统性质量评估。

name: filesystem-context
author: muratcankoylan
description: This skill should be used when the user asks to "offload context to files", "implement dynamic context discovery", "use filesystem for agent memory", "reduce context window bloat", or mentions file-based context management, tool output persistence, agent scratch pads, or just-in-time context loading.

name: hosted-agents
author: muratcankoylan
description: This skill should be used when the user asks to "build background agent", "create hosted coding agent", "set up sandboxed execution", "implement multiplayer agent", or mentions background agents, sandboxed VMs, agent infrastructure, Modal sandboxes, self-spawning agents, or remote coding environments.

name: memory-systems
author: muratcankoylan
description: Guides implementation of agent memory systems, compares production frameworks (Mem0, Zep/Graphiti, Letta, LangMem, Cognee), and designs persistence architectures for cross-session knowledge retention. Use when the user asks to "implement agent memory", "persist state across sessions", "build knowledge graph for agents", "track entities over time", "add long-term memory", "choose a memory framework", or mentions temporal knowledge graphs, vector stores, entity memory, adaptive memory, dynamic memory or memory benchmarks (LoCoMo, LongMemEval).
description_zh: 该技能为AI代理实现记忆系统提供结构化指南，涵盖文件存储、向量RAG、知识图谱和时间图谱。包含明确的激活条件、架构对比以及实体追踪和时间查询的实用代码示例。
_original_description: This skill provides a structured guide for implementing memory systems in AI agents, covering file storage, vector RAG, knowledge graphs, and temporal graphs. It includes clear activation triggers, architecture comparisons, and practical code examples for entity tracking and temporal queries.

name: multi-agent-patterns
author: muratcankoylan
description: This skill should be used when the user asks to "design multi-agent system", "implement supervisor pattern", "create swarm architecture", "coordinate multiple agents", or mentions multi-agent patterns, context isolation, agent handoffs, sub-agents, or parallel agent execution.
description_zh: 该技能为设计多智能体LLM系统提供详细指导。它解释了监督者、群组等架构模式，讨论了令牌经济学和常见故障模式，并提供了实用的实施建议。适合构建超出单上下文限制的复杂智能体工作流的开发者参考。

name: project-development
author: muratcankoylan
description: This skill should be used when the user asks to "start an LLM project", "design batch pipeline", "evaluate task-model fit", "structure agent project", or mentions pipeline architecture, agent-assisted development, cost estimation, or choosing between LLM and traditional approaches.
description_zh: 一个全面的LLM项目开发方法论指南，提供了任务评估、管道架构和代理辅助开发的实用框架，具有清晰的决策标准。

name: skill-template
author: muratcankoylan
description: Template for creating new Agent Skills for context engineering. Use this template when adding new skills to the collection.
description_zh: 一个结构清晰的Claude技能模板，为上下文工程提供明确的内容组织指南、实践考虑和集成模式。
_original_description: A well-structured template for creating Claude Skills with clear guidance on content organization, practical considerations, and integration patterns for context engineering.

name: tool-design

description: This skill should be used when the user asks to "design agent tools", "create tool descriptions", "reduce tool complexity", "implement MCP tools", or mentions tool consolidation, architectural reduction, tool naming conventions, or agent-tool interfaces.

name: fix-issue

description: Use when working on a GitHub issue - fetches issue details, analyzes codebase, implements fix following project methodology

Agent assistance skill that provides stuck detection, memory management, and session learning capabilities for AI agents

name: change-impact-analyzer
author: nahisaho
description:
Analyzes impact of proposed changes on existing systems (brownfield projects) with delta spec validation.

Trigger terms: change impact, impact analysis, brownfield, delta spec, change proposal,
change management, existing system analysis, integration impact, breaking changes,
dependency analysis, affected components, migration plan, risk assessment, brownfield change.

Provides comprehensive change analysis for existing systems:
- Affected component identification
- Breaking change detection
- Dependency graph updates
- Integration point impact
- Database migration analysis
- API compatibility checks
- Risk assessment and mitigation strategies
- Migration plan recommendations

Use when: proposing changes to existing systems, analyzing brownfield integration,
or validating delta specifications.

Copilot agent for cloud architecture design, AWS/Azure/GCP configuration, IaC code generation (Terraform/Bicep), and cost optimization

Copilot agent that assists with comprehensive code review focusing on code quality, SOLID principles, security, performance, and best practices

Use when: User requests involve code reviewer tasks.

name: constitution-enforcer
author: nahisaho
description:
Validates compliance with 9 Constitutional Articles and Phase -1 Gates before implementation.

Trigger terms: constitution, governance, compliance, validation, constitutional compliance,
Phase -1 Gates, simplicity gate, anti-abstraction gate, test-first, library-first,
EARS compliance, governance validation, constitutional audit, compliance check, gate validation.

Enforces all 9 Constitutional Articles with automated validation:
- Article I: Library-First Principle
- Article II: CLI Interface Mandate
- Article III: Test-First Imperative
- Article IV: EARS Requirements Format
- Article V: Traceability Mandate
- Article VI: Project Memory
- Article VII: Simplicity Gate
- Article VIII: Anti-Abstraction Gate
- Article IX: Integration-First Testing

Runs Phase -1 Gates before any implementation begins.

Use when: validating project governance, checking constitutional compliance,
or enforcing quality gates before implementation.

name: traceability-auditor
author: nahisaho
description:
Validates complete requirements traceability across EARS requirements → design → tasks → code → tests.

Trigger terms: traceability, requirements coverage, coverage matrix, traceability matrix,
requirement mapping, test coverage, EARS coverage, requirements tracking, traceability audit,
gap detection, orphaned requirements, untested code, coverage validation, traceability analysis.

Enforces Constitutional Article V (Traceability Mandate) with comprehensive validation:
- Requirement → Design mapping (100% coverage)
- Design → Task mapping
- Task → Code implementation mapping
- Code → Test mapping (100% coverage)
- Gap detection (orphaned requirements, untested code)
- Coverage percentage reporting
- Traceability matrix generation

Use when: user needs traceability validation, coverage analysis, gap detection,
or requirements tracking across the full development lifecycle.
